summary: Completed frontend testing of Telegram duels app fixes - notifications panel, Create Duel button, and wallet connection modal all working correctly

console_warnings.issue: Unknown prop warnings for 'active' attribute being sent to DOM
console_warnings.impact: Console warnings only, no functional impact

console_warnings.issue: 403 errors for remote project configuration - domain not in allowlist
console_warnings.impact: Falls back to local configuration, wallet connection still works

passed_tests: Notifications panel can be closed via close button
Create Duel button is always clickable (not disabled)
Alert shows when clicking Create Duel without wallet connected
All required wallet options present: Browser Wallet, MetaMask, Trust Wallet, OKX, WalletConnect, Coinbase
Filter tabs (All, Open, Live, My Duels) are clickable
Duels list displays 3 duel cards correctly
Join duel buttons present in duel cards
No critical error messages on page
